maxJobs.title: Max Jobs
maxJobs.description: Maximum number of jobs to return. Set to 0 to return all captured jobs.

searchQuery.title: Search Query
searchQuery.description: Filter jobs by keyword in title, team, or description.

locationQuery.title: Location Query
locationQuery.description: Filter jobs by location text (e.g., Zurich, Berlin, Austin).

maxWaitForJobsSecs.title: Max Wait (seconds)
maxWaitForJobsSecs.description: Maximum time to wait for Tesla jobs network responses before fallback parsing.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify proxy configuration. Residential proxies are recommended for Tesla.
